# 70NYC — New York Web Design & Digital Marketing

> 70NYC is a New York–based web design and digital marketing agency serving Chinese-owned businesses across Manhattan, Flushing, Brooklyn, Long Island, and nationwide (remote). 13+ years experience. Bilingual Chinese/English team.

## Contact

- Website: https://70nyc.com/
- English: https://70nyc.com/en/
- Phone: +1-386-316-1848
- Email: info@70nyc.com
- WeChat: i70nyc
- Location: New York, NY, USA
